_comment: Vote Unbiased — channels probed by /api/live-discover for live streams. Each entry's url must be a YouTube /live channel URL. Detection is keyless (no YouTube API quota): the endpoint fetches the page and reads ytInitialPlayerResponse.
_autoCover: autoCover: true lets the Live Broadcast GitHub Action start the Deepgram→Claude fact-check worker AUTOMATICALLY when this channel goes live (no schedule entry needed). Guardrails: maxCoverMinutes caps each auto-session (~$0.36/hr Deepgram + Claude); the next cron tick re-covers if still live. Leave autoCover false for channels that stream near-24/7 (C-SPAN) — enabling it there means paying for continuous coverage.
